name: Vladimir Putin

background.experience: KGB Officer, Prime Minister/President of Russia
background.philosophy: Eurasianism, Great Power Realism, energy as geopolitical leverage

behavioral_patterns.conflict: Prefers slow, grinding attrition or hybrid 'grey zone' tactics. Uses energy exports as a weapon to divide alliances.
behavioral_patterns.response_to_sanctions: Builds 'Fortress Russia' through gold accumulation and pivot to Asian markets (China, India).
behavioral_patterns.negotiation: Values 'hard' security guarantees over verbal agreements. Uses military presence as the primary negotiation tool.

interaction_logic.with_the_west: Views as a declining force attempting to encircle Russia; focuses on creating 'multi-polarity'.
interaction_logic.with_energy_markets: Directly manipulates supply (OPEC+) to fund the state and project power.
interaction_logic.with_china: Strategic partnership of convenience against Western hegemony.

shadow_data_triggers: NATO troop movements near Russian borders
Sanctions on energy exports or financial systems
